prd_refs: PRD §8.3 Dependency strategy / Bundled module dependency (lines 1349-1369)
§3.1 lists the FxConsole public surface SlashOps consumes.
§8.3 mandates vendoring (with license preservation) until FxConsole is published as its own Gallery module.
§17 Q1: revisit vendor-vs-dependency decision before v1.0.
description: Vendor the FxConsole module under `src/SlashOps/vendor/FxConsole/` so Gallery users get a working UI without manually cloning. Preserve the MIT license verbatim, record the upstream commit SHA in `SOURCE_VERSION.txt`, and add a Pester test that imports the vendored module to catch regressions.
notes: Do not modify FxConsole source; treat the vendor folder as read-only mirror.
If upstream changes its public surface, `ui-*` tasks need to adapt — re-vendor and re-run the export-list test before touching UI tasks.
steps: TDD: All public exports listed in PRD §3.1 (`Set-FxTheme`, `Get-FxTheme`, `Format-Fx`, `Write-Fx`, `Write-FxStatus`, `Write-FxStep`, `Write-FxShimmer`, `Invoke-FxJob`, `Write-FxBanner`, `Write-FxCard`, `Write-FxPanel`, `Write-FxTable`, `Write-FxGrid`, `Write-FxProgress`, `Invoke-FxProgress`, `Invoke-FxScript`) resolve as functions.
TDD: LICENSE file checksum matches upstream MIT.
TDD: `SOURCE_VERSION.txt` contains a non-empty commit SHA.
Clone or download FxConsole from `https://github.com/andresharpe/FxConsole` at a known commit. Copy `src/FxConsole/` contents into `src/SlashOps/vendor/FxConsole/`.
Write `SOURCE_VERSION.txt` containing the commit SHA and date pulled.
Add a `.gitignore` exclusion for any FxConsole user-state files (e.g. `*.user.json`).
name: [f-04] Vendor FxConsole into the module
